mapper.sql: select group_id, group_name, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from cnsl_template_group
mapper.select:
select g.group_id, g.group_name, (select COUNT(t.template_id) from cnsl_template t where t.group_id = g.group_id) as templateCount, (select GROUP_CONCAT(CONCAT(v.software_name, ' ', v.version_no) Separator ', ') as version_desc from cnsl_rds_version v, cnsl_template_group_version gv where v.version_id = gv.version_id and gv.group_id = g.group_id) as versions, g.create_by, g.create_time, g.update_by, g.update_time, g.remark from cnsl_template_group g
and g.group_name like concat('%', #{groupName}, '%')
select g.group_id, g.group_name from cnsl_template_group g
mapper.insert:
insert into cnsl_template_group
group_name, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark,
#{groupName}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{remark},
mapper.delete:
delete from cnsl_template_group where group_id in
#{groupId}
